elements.name: Validate Promise Date Update for "Branch Order"

steps.name: User login into SCM application
User navigate to Order Management
User navigate to "Order Management" Sub section
User clicks on Create Order
User should see Create Order Page
User Select Customer as "WALKER PLUMBING & HEATING,88605"
User select Order Type as "Branch Order"
User search and add the product "R40003"
User click on Shipment Details option
User should see Shipment Details Page
User navigate to supply tab under Shipment Details
User enters "1BL" in warehouse dropdown
User clicks on submit under Shipment Details
User should see Sales Order Confirmation pop up
Capture the Requested Date for the Order Line
User clicks on OK
User select Create Revision under actions dropdown
User click on Shipment Details option
User changes the Requested Date
User clicks on submit under Shipment Details
User should see pop up "Your revised order was accepted and is being processed"
User clicks on Ok
User click on Shipment Details option
User should see the Updated Requested Date under Order Line Details
